reason: Global RVV-first authority chain, Stage ordering, and descriptor/source-front-door guardrails for the bounded selected-boundary materializer.
RVV plugin-owned typed body, source/ABI/runtime flow, route support, and fail-closed authority placement.
Common EmitC route boundary; provider-owned route facts must remain the semantic authority.

summary: Added RVV plugin-owned bounded Vector-like i32 add source-front-door materializer and registered it as default artifact-front-door eligible while retaining the explicit-only legacy fail-closed pass.

Materializer now accepts source marker 'bounded_vector_source', validates one source function with lhs/rhs/out memref<?xi32> and n:index, matches two vector.transfer_read ops, one arith.addi, and one vector.transfer_write, then builds selected tcrv.exec plus typed generic tcrv_rvv load/binary/store body using runtime n as AVL/VL input.
Added memref dialect registration/linkage for source-pattern parsing and updated plugin registration smoke expectations for both RVV source-front-door passes.
Added positive materialization/plan/header/default-pipeline lit evidence and negative fail-closed coverage for unsupported dtype, missing runtime n, and stale pre-existing selected-boundary residue.
